name: @bolthub/agent
description: L402 client for AI agents — pay Lightning invoices automatically to access paywalled APIs

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && cp dist/index.js dist/index.mjs && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs && bun build src/index.browser.ts --outfile dist/index.browser.mjs --target browser --format esm && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --declaration --project tsconfig.build.json
